overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera follows a modified pickup truck as it navigates multi-lane highways and urban canyons with towering glass skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and elevated transit systems. The scene transitions from open highways to enclosed urban corridors and covered plazas with dynamic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: navigating a futuristic pickup truck along an elevated highway at high speed, weaving through moderate traffic while approaching the city center

notable_agents.action: yellow truck driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: metal safety barrier with yellow stripe running along the right side of the elevated road
large floating advertisement displaying animated graphics and product images on the left side of the highway
elevated transit track structure with support pillars spanning across the highway overhead
tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated highway with clear skies above. The camera follows a modified pickup truck driving at speed past holographic billboards and under monorail tracks. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance while traffic flows moderately in multiple lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban canyon between high-rise buildings with hotel signage

events.description: highway enters dense urban canyon with buildings closing in on both sides creating a corridor effect
natural sunlight diminishes significantly as vehicle enters deep shadow cast by towering surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through denser traffic in the urban canyon, passing illuminated hotel signs and building entrances while maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the right side between lanes
white truck maintaining speed in the left lane parallel to ego

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with 'TENOU' text and Japanese characters mounted on the right building facade
illuminated awning structure with purple lighting marking the hotel entrance
dark glass and steel facade of the left-side skyscraper creating a canyon wall effect

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense urban canyon where towering buildings create a corridor effect. Bright pink neon signs for the TENOU Hotel illuminate the right side while traffic density increases. Natural light fades as the canyon deepens, replaced by mixed artificial lighting from building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit plaza with illuminated ceiling and connecting tunnel

events.description: vehicle enters covered plaza with glowing blue-green translucent ceiling structure overhead
exiting covered plaza into darker tunnel section with artificial wall lighting and reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: driving through the covered plaza with reflective flooring that mirrors the ceiling lights, then entering the darker tunnel section

notable_agents.action: delivery truck ahead maintaining steady speed through the covered section

entered.detail: illuminated translucent ceiling panels emitting blue and green light across the entire plaza surface
wet or polished road surface creating mirror-like reflections of the overhead lighting
smooth concrete wall of the underpass with embedded horizontal lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes into a covered plaza featuring a glowing translucent ceiling that bathes the area in blue-green light. The reflective road surface mirrors the illumination above. The scene transitions into a darker tunnel section with concrete walls and artificial lighting before approaching the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with industrial overpasses and construction zones

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open air with clear blue sky visible between industrial structures
vehicle navigates curved ramp section with merging traffic from the right

agents.ego_description: accelerating on the open highway, passing under massive industrial overpasses and alongside construction scaffolding while navigating gentle curves

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving parallel in the left lane at matching speed
tan sedan merging into traffic flow from the right ramp

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway interchange structure with support pillars spanning the road
green safety netting and metal scaffolding covering the right-side building under construction
clear blue sky visible between the industrial structures and overpasses

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into bright daylight, the vehicle enters an industrial highway section with massive overpasses and interchanges. Construction scaffolding lines the right side while the road curves gently. Traffic flows smoothly in multiple lanes under the clear afternoon sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from an open elevated highway through a dense neon urban core and finally back into a bright industrial landscape. It begins on a wide highway under clear skies, gliding past holographic billboards and monorail tracks toward a distant skyline of glass skyscrapers. As the vehicle enters a dense urban canyon, the natural light fades and is replaced by the glow of pink neon signs and towering building facades that create a narrow corridor effect. The scene then shifts into a covered plaza with a translucent blue-green ceiling and reflective roads before plunging into a dark, concrete tunnel. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel back into bright afternoon daylight, following the road as it curves through an industrial highway section characterized by massive overpasses and construction scaffolding.
